## Severity
<!-- BLOCKER / CRITICAL / MAJOR / MINOR / OBSERVATION -->

## Finding
<!-- What's wrong — one sentence -->

```
file:line — paste the offending code
```

## Impact
<!-- What breaks or degrades if this isn't fixed -->

## Fix
<!-- What the fix looks like — specific, not vague -->

## Regression check
<!-- How to verify the fix works — specific test steps -->

## Discovered by
<!-- Which audit session / PR / script found this -->
